headlines.headline: Strynal Industries secures $500M contract with a top-tier research institute

sentiment.reasoning: The $500M contract provides a clear, substantial revenue boost that will positively impact financial performance over the next 100 days.

headlines.headline: Strynal Industries faces class action over precision manufacturing service disruption

headlines.headline: Zrovov Advisors secures $120M contract with a major logistics provider

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $120M contract provides a concrete revenue tailwind that will be reflected in financial results over the coming months.

headlines.headline: Zrovov Advisors secures $75M contract with a multinational manufacturer

sentiment.reasoning: This additional $75M contract further strengthens the company's revenue outlook and reinforces positive momentum.

headlines.headline: Plevyl Advisors reports 12% decline in operating income

sentiment.reasoning: A second consecutive report of declining operating income suggests persistent operational challenges that will likely depress valuation.

headlines.headline: Plevyl Advisors sees mixed results in cloud infrastructure pilot program

headlines.headline: Zrovov Advisors launches next-generation cloud infrastructure platform

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
